description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 12 hrs 43 mins coding, with a daily average of 3 hrs 7 mins. His tracked work was spread across 5 projects, and his most used languages were Python, Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, including #106 through #117.
